'''Novoil Cluster StarGoods''' was a company that specialized in remanufactured and rebuilt [[Starship/Legends|starship]] components and systems. When the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]] fell into decline following the [[Battle of Endor/Legends|Battle of Endor]], Novoil acquired large stocks of abandoned [[TIE/ln space superiority starfighter/Legends|TIE/LN starfighters]] and restored them for sale to planetary defense forces.

{{Company-stub}}
